item.title: The Worst Cinderella Movie Yet
item.description: Many filmmakers have tried and failed to retell the Cinderella story, and this one is no different...

media:content.media:title: The Worst Cinderella Movie Yet
media:content.media:description: Many filmmakers have tried and failed to retell the Cinderella story, and this one is no different...

item.title: Try Not to Feel Old
item.description: Journey through a nostalgic trip down memory lane! This video explores a TikTok account showcasing 2000s trends, prompting reflections on childhood and adolescence.

media:content.media:title: Try Not to Feel Old
media:content.media:description: Journey through a nostalgic trip down memory lane! This video explores a TikTok account showcasing 2000s trends, prompting reflections on childhood and adolescence.

item.title: This “Wish Granted” Movie Got Me
item.description: Rewatching this wish-granted movie and realizing it’s equal parts emotional and unintentionally awkward.

media:content.media:title: This “Wish Granted” Movie Got Me
media:content.media:description: Rewatching this wish-granted movie and realizing it’s equal parts emotional and unintentionally awkward.
